name: Flip Tricks
description: The core of your skating tricks. Master your board control with Flick-it.

sub_items.name: Ollie Flips
sub_items.description: Pull down then flick up and you are in the world of ollie tricks.

sub_items.name: Ollie
sub_items.description: Pull down to get ready then flick all the way up to ollie. Crouch longer and flick faster to ollie higher.

sub_items.name: Kickflip
sub_items.description: Flick on an angle towards your heelside. Originally named the "magic flip" because no one understood how it worked.

sub_items.name: Heelflip
sub_items.description: Flick-it on angle towards your toeside. The last part of the foot to leave the board is the heel, hence the name.

sub_items.name: Pop Shuvit
sub_items.description: Pull down then swing it up around the heelside to ollie and shuve the board. The board will do a 180.

sub_items.name: FS Pop Shuvit
sub_items.description: Pull down then swing it up around the toeside to shuvit fronside.

sub_items.name: 360 Pop Shuvit
sub_items.description: The starting position is down and off to one side, then swing around the bottom and up.

sub_items.name: FS 360 Pop Shuvit
sub_items.description: Learning the starting point is important. Watch the feet, they will move when you are in the right spot.

sub_items.name: Varial Kickflip
sub_items.description: Pop-Shuvit combined with a kickflip. It may help to think kof the Flick-it movements like check marks.

sub_items.name: Inward Heelflip
sub_items.description: Pop-Shuvit combined with a heelflip. The mirror of this trick is the Hardflip.

sub_items.name: Varial Heelflip
sub_items.description: FS pop-shuvit combined with a heelflip.

sub_items.name: Hardflip
sub_items.description: FS pop-shuvit combined with a kickflip. It can be very awkward to pull off.

sub_items.name: 360 Flip
sub_items.description: Start it like a 360 Pup-Shuvit, but finish with a kickflip. Also knows as a 360 Kickflip, 3-Flip or Tré Flip.

sub_items.name: 360 Inward Heelflip
sub_items.description: 360 Pop-Shuvit combined with a heelflip. Crazy trick.

sub_items.name: Laser Flip
sub_items.description: Simply a FS 360 Pop-Shuvit with a Heelflip. This is the opposite of a 360 Flip.

sub_items.name: 360 Hardflip
sub_items.description: Chris Cole pulled this combination of a FS 360 Pop-Shuvit with a kickflip. Just watch it

sub_items.name: Double Kickflip
sub_items.description: Flick then hold the end of the kickflip to keep the board flipping.

sub_items.name: Triple Kickflip
sub_items.description: Need more air time to get a triple kickflip to make it around.

sub_items.name: Quad Kickflip
sub_items.description: Yes, Quad Kickflips have been done in reality. In the game you just have to keep holding.

sub_items.name: Double Heelflip
sub_items.description: Flick then hold the end of the heelflip to keep it flipping.

sub_items.name: Triple Heelflip
sub_items.description: Find something to jump off to try a Triple and release to land.

sub_items.name: Quad Heelflip
sub_items.description: Hold it. Quad flips are the most you can do.

sub_items.name: Nollie Flips
sub_items.description: Nollie tricks are done off the nose of the board.   Push forward then flick all the way down.

sub_items.name: Nollie
sub_items.description: An ollie performed off the nose. Push forward then flick all the way down to Nollie.

sub_items.name: Nollie Heelflip
sub_items.description: Flick the Nollie on an angle towards your toeside. The flip will be done with your back foot.

sub_items.name: Nollie Kickflip
sub_items.description: Flick down on an angle towards your heelside.

sub_items.name: Nollie Pop Shuvit
sub_items.description: Push forward then swing it around the heelside to pop a Nollie and shuv the board.

sub_items.name: Nollie FS Pop Shuvit
sub_items.description: Push forward then swing it around the toeside to shuvit frontside.

sub_items.name: Nollie 360 Pop Shuvit
sub_items.description: The starting position is off to one side of the top.

sub_items.name: Nollie FS 360 Pop Shuvit
sub_items.description: Find the starting points to learn your 360 shuvits and that will open the door for harder tricks.

sub_items.name: Nollie Varial Kickflip
sub_items.description: Nollie Pop-Shuvit combined with a Nollie Kickflip.

sub_items.name: Nollie Inward Heelflip
sub_items.description: The opposite side and flip of the Varial Kickflip. Flip Tricks respond based on which way you are standing.

sub_items.name: Nollie Hardflip
sub_items.description: Nollie FS Pop-Shuvit finished with a Nollie Kickflip all combined into one movement.

sub_items.name: Nollie Varial Heelflip
sub_items.description: If you can do the Nollie Hardflip then you can do this one easy enough when you are standing the other way.

sub_items.name: Nollie 360 Flip
sub_items.description: Start like a Nollie 360 Pop-Shuvit then finish with a Nollie Kickflip.

sub_items.name: Nollie 360 Inward Heelflip
sub_items.description: Equally as crazy as the regular version.

sub_items.name: Nollie Laser Flip
sub_items.description: Nollie 360 Pop-Shuvit Heelflip.

sub_items.name: Nollie 360 Hardflip
sub_items.description: See if you can call it before you do it to prove you didn't just get lucky.

sub_items.name: Nollie Double Heelflip
sub_items.description: Hold the end of the Nollie Heelflip to keep the board flipping.

sub_items.name: Nollie Triple Heelflip
sub_items.description: You will need to get some more air time to pull off triples.

sub_items.name: Nollie Quad Heelflip
sub_items.description: Just keep holding, but it won't go any more than four.

sub_items.name: Nollie Double Kickflip
sub_items.description: Nollie back at an angle towards the heel side and hold.

sub_items.name: Nollie Triple Kickflip
sub_items.description: You can do double flips on flat ground, but need more air to try triples.

sub_items.name: Nollie Quad Kickflip
sub_items.description: One, Two, Three and Four. Crazy.

sub_items.name: Late Flips
sub_items.description: Most flip tricks start on the ground, but you can also throw down tricks while you are in the air.

sub_items.name: Late Kickflip
sub_items.description: From the center, pull down and flick back up quickly.

sub_items.name: Late Heelflip
sub_items.description: You have to start in the center to do late flips. Then do it quick.

sub_items.name: Late Backfoot Heelflip
sub_items.description: Late backfoot flips are similar to a nollie and also need to start from the center.

sub_items.name: Late Backfoot Kickflip
sub_items.description: Late flips won't work if the skater is already doing a flip trick. Wait for them to end.

sub_items.name: Late Shuvit
sub_items.description: Late shuvits take the same motion as Pop-Shuvits and can be done from the bottom to the top or the top to the bottom.

sub_items.name: Late FS Shuvit
sub_items.description: The board will rotate in same direction that your move the right stick.

sub_items.name: Dark Catches
sub_items.description: Catch the board with your feet while it is upside down.

sub_items.name: Nollie Kickflip Dark Catch
sub_items.description: Darkcatches are done by catching the board with your feet, while it is flipping upside down.

sub_items.name: Kickflip Dark Catch
sub_items.description: Darkcatches are done by catching the board with your feet, while it is flipping upside down.

sub_items.name: Nollie Heelflip Dark Catch
sub_items.description: Darkcatches are done by catching the board with your feet, while it is flipping upside down.

sub_items.name: Heelflip Dark Catch
sub_items.description: Darkcatches are done by catching the board with your feet, while it is flipping upside down.

sub_items.name: Underflips
sub_items.description: Quickly and smoothly flip the board in the opposite direction to perform an underflip.

sub_items.name: Nollie Kickflip Underflip
sub_items.description: Flipping the board while it is already flipping is called an Underflip. Quickly flick the right stick in the opposite direction of your fliptrick.

sub_items.name: Heelflip Underflip
sub_items.description: Flipping the board while it is already flipping is called an Underflip. Quickly flick the right stick in the opposite direction of your fliptrick.

sub_items.name: Nollie Pop Shuvit Underflip
sub_items.description: Flipping the board while it is already flipping is called an Underflip. Quickly flick the right stick in the opposite direction of your fliptrick.

sub_items.name: Nollie Heelflip Underflip
sub_items.description: Flipping the board while it is already flipping is called an Underflip. Quickly flick the right stick in the opposite direction of your fliptrick.

sub_items.name: Pop Shuvit Underflip
sub_items.description: Flipping the board while it is already flipping is called an Underflip. Quickly flick the right stick in the opposite direction of your fliptrick.

sub_items.name: Kickflip Underflip
sub_items.description: Flipping the board while it is already flipping is called an Underflip. Quickly flick the right stick in the opposite direction of your fliptrick.

name: Grab Tricks
description: Grabs, One-Foots, Fingerflips, Footplants, and more!

sub_items.name: Grabs
sub_items.description: Grab then tweak or tweak then grab. Either hand or both. Every combination is a different grab you can do in the air.

sub_items.name: BS Grab
sub_items.description: Grab the heel side of the board with your front hand. You do know which one is your front hand, don't you?

sub_items.name: FS Grab
sub_items.description: It is good to know which hand is your toe side. That hand is for your FS Grabs.

sub_items.name: Double Grab
sub_items.description: Air grab with both hands! You can tweak it a little just for fun or go for the Superdude.

sub_items.name: Nosebone
sub_items.description: Grab FS then push the board forwards to bone it out.

sub_items.name: Tailbone
sub_items.description: Opposite of the Nosebone. Grab FS then pull the board back to point the tail.

sub_items.name: Stiffy
sub_items.description: Grab FS then tweak the board out on the same side. You'll know it when you see it.

sub_items.name: Tuck Knee
sub_items.description: Also known as a Japan Air. Tweak the FS Grab towards your heel side to drop the knee.

sub_items.name: No-Foot Air
sub_items.description: Artist interpretation of a FS Christ Air. FS Grab then hold the button. Release if you actually want to land it.

sub_items.name: BS Tweak
sub_items.description: Grab BS then pull the board back to get into this tweak.

sub_items.name: Melon
sub_items.description: Melon is a nosebone backside grab. Grab BS then push the board forwards.

sub_items.name: Cross Bone
sub_items.description: Grab BS then tweak it across towards your toe side.

sub_items.name: Method
sub_items.description: Originally invented it as a "method" for getting higher on a backside air. Grab BS then tweak it out on the same side.

sub_items.name: Nose Grab
sub_items.description: First pull the board back to lift up the nose. Then grab with your front hand. Tweak first or you mihght end up in a Melon.

sub_items.name: Tail Grab
sub_items.description: First push the board forward. Then grab with your back hand. Wrong hand and you will be in a Seatbelt.

sub_items.name: Christ Air
sub_items.description: BS Grab then hold the button to extend arms and legs and look like a capital 'T'.

sub_items.name: BS Shifty Nose Grab
sub_items.description: Get into a nose grab then tweak it off to the toe side.

sub_items.name: FS Shifty Nose Grab
sub_items.description: Get into a nose grab then tweak it off to the heel side.

sub_items.name: FS Shifty Tail Grab
sub_items.description: Get into a tail grab then tweak it off to the heel side.

sub_items.name: BS Shifty Tail Grab
sub_items.description: Get into a tail grab then tweak it off to the toe side.

sub_items.name: Stale
sub_items.description: The full name is Stale Fish, like it or not. First turn the board sideways. Then grab on with your back hand.

sub_items.name: Mute
sub_items.description: First turn the board sideways. Then grab on with your front hand.

sub_items.name: Stale Tailbone
sub_items.description: Get into a Stale Grab then pull the board down to point the tail.

sub_items.name: Stale Nosebone
sub_items.description: Get into a Stale Grab then push the board forward to bone out the nose.

sub_items.name: Stale Tuck Knee
sub_items.description: Get into a Stale Grab then tweak the board back under the skater to tuck the knees.

sub_items.name: Mute Nosebone
sub_items.description: Get into a Mute Grab then push the board forward to bone out the nose.

sub_items.name: Mute Tailbone
sub_items.description: Get into a Mute Grab then pull the board down to point the tail.

sub_items.name: Mute Tuck Knee
sub_items.description: Get into a Mute Grab then tweak the board back under the skater to tuck the knees.

sub_items.name: Superdude
sub_items.description: Double grab then kick both feet off. Also connects to Christ and No-Foot Airs.

sub_items.name: Crail
sub_items.description: You might get this when going for a nose grab. Just pay attention to which hand is which.

sub_items.name: Seatbelt
sub_items.description: Depending on your stand it will be like a passenger side or driver side seatbelt.

sub_items.name: BS Shifty Crail
sub_items.description: Get into a crail grab then tweak it off to the toe side.

sub_items.name: FS Shifty Seatbelt
sub_items.description: Get into a seatbelt grab then tweak it off to the heel side.

sub_items.name: FS Shifty Crail
sub_items.description: Get into a crail grab then tweak it off to the heel side.

sub_items.name: BS Shifty Seatbelt
sub_items.description: Get into a seatbelt grab then tweak it off to the toe side.

sub_items.name: Rocket Air
sub_items.description: First pull the board back to lift up the nose. Then grab on with both hands Rocketman.

sub_items.name: One Foots
sub_items.description: Add even more variety to your tricks by taking off either foot or both.

sub_items.name: Front Foot
sub_items.description: Kick off your front foot in the air and release to land it. Some katers call it an Ollie North.

sub_items.name: Back Foot
sub_items.description: Kicking off your back foot in the air. Some skaters might call this an Ollie South.

sub_items.name: Frigid Air
sub_items.description: FS Grab then kick your front foot off.

sub_items.name: FS One Foot
sub_items.description: Get into a FS Grab then kick your abck foot off.

sub_items.name: Judo
sub_items.description: Classic kick out from a BS Grab.

sub_items.name: One Foot
sub_items.description: Get into a BS Grab then kick out to the back.

sub_items.name: Dog Piss
sub_items.description: Nose Grab then kick off your back foot.

sub_items.name: Judo Nose Grab
sub_items.description: Nose Grab then Judo.

sub_items.name: Airwalk
sub_items.description: Pull the board back, then grab the nose and then kick both feet off.

sub_items.name: One Foot Tail Grab
sub_items.description: Tail Grab then kick off your front foot.

sub_items.name: Benihanna
sub_items.description: Often discouraged, but always entertaining. Tail Grab then kick off your back foot.

sub_items.name: Tailwalk
sub_items.description: A new classic. Push the board forward, then grab the tail, then kick off both feet and release to land.

sub_items.name: Fingerflips
sub_items.description: Fingerflips are flip tricks you can do when you are grabbing the board.

sub_items.name: BS Fingerflip
sub_items.description: BS Grab then Flick-it.

sub_items.name: FS Fingerflip
sub_items.description: Flick-it during a FS Grab to flip the board.

sub_items.name: FS Varial
sub_items.description: Get into a FS Grab then shuv the board frontside.

sub_items.name: BS Varial
sub_items.description: Get into a BS Grab then shuv the board backside.

sub_items.name: BS to Mute
sub_items.description: BS Grab then do a FS shuv to switch to a Mute.

sub_items.name: FS to Stale
sub_items.description: FS Grab then shuv the board backside to switch to a Stale.

sub_items.name: Fingerflip
sub_items.description: Pull the board back, then grab the nose, then Flick-it.

sub_items.name: Tail Flip
sub_items.description: Push the board forward, then grab with your back hand and Flick-it.

sub_items.name: Stale Flip
sub_items.description: First figure out the Stale Grab, then just Flick0it.

sub_items.name: Stale to FS
sub_items.description: Get into the Stale Grab then shuv the board to switch to a FS Grab.

sub_items.name: Mute Flip
sub_items.description: Master the Mute Grab, then Flick-it.

sub_items.name: Mute to BS
sub_items.description: Mute Grab then shuv it frontside to switch into a BS Grab.

sub_items.name: Crail to Tail
sub_items.description: Pull the board back, grab the nose with your back hand, then shuvit around to a Tail Grab.

sub_items.name: Seatbelt to Nose
sub_items.description: Get into a Seatbelt grab, then shuv it to switch to a Nose Grab.

sub_items.name: Foot Plants
sub_items.description: Footplants are easy as landing during a one foot.

sub_items.name: Judo Footplant
sub_items.description: Just hold the Judo while landing, but don't try it going too fast.

sub_items.name: Fastplant
sub_items.description: Learn our FS One Foot then jusr hold it to land into a Fastplant.

sub_items.name: BS Footplant
sub_items.description: Hold onto the one foot as you land, then find a cooler place to do it.

sub_items.name: FS Footplant
sub_items.description: Frigid Air then hold it to land into a FS Footplant.

sub_items.name: Boneless
sub_items.description: Boneless tricks are triggered when you push during a ground grab.

sub_items.name: Bean Plant
sub_items.description: Grab BS while skating then push with your front foot.

sub_items.name: BS Fastplant
sub_items.description: BS Grab then push off with your back foot.

sub_items.name: FS Boneless
sub_items.description: FS Grab while skating then push with your front foot. Be careful of your speed.

sub_items.name: FS Fastplant
sub_items.description: FS Grab then push off with your back foot.

name: Grinds and Lip Tricks
description: All the grinds, slides, and lip tricks in the book and how to do them.

sub_items.name: Grinds
sub_items.description: Any grind trick in which the trucks make contact with the rail or ledge.

sub_items.name: BS 50-50
sub_items.description: 50-50 is when both trucks are grinding. Just line up the grind.

sub_items.name: FS 50-50
sub_items.description: 50-50 is when both trucks are grinding. Just line up the grind.

sub_items.name: FS 5-0
sub_items.description: Pull the board back to do a 5-0 grind, which is half of a 50-50.

sub_items.name: BS 5-0
sub_items.description: Pull the board back to do a 5-0 grind, which is half of a 50-50.

sub_items.name: FS Nosegrind
sub_items.description: Line up with the rail and push the board forward to land into a Nose Grind.

sub_items.name: BS Nosegrind
sub_items.description: Line up with the rail and push the board forward to land into a Nose Grind.

sub_items.name: BS Crooked
sub_items.description: Also known as a Crooked or K-grind. Crooks is a nose grind twisted off to the side.

sub_items.name: FS Crooked
sub_items.description: Approach with the grind on your toeside than point the nose at an angle towards it.

sub_items.name: FS Overcrooks
sub_items.description: Approach frontside, point the nose down and angle away from the grind.

sub_items.name: BS Overcrooks
sub_items.description: Similar to a Crooks, but the board is angled to the far side of the grind.

sub_items.name: FS Salad
sub_items.description: Approach Frontside and pull back on an angle or twist from a 5-0 grind.

sub_items.name: BS Salad
sub_items.description: A Salad Grind is a tweaked 5-0 grind with the nose of the board angled to the far side of the grind.

sub_items.name: BS Smith
sub_items.description: Another way to get into Smith Grinds is do a 5-0 then let go of the board ot let the nose drop down.

sub_items.name: FS Smith
sub_items.description: Smith grinds can be hard to get into. Point the nose and then turn just a little just before your land.

sub_items.name: BS Feeble
sub_items.description: Approach backside, point the nose and turn just a little across the grind.

sub_items.name: FS Feeble
sub_items.description: Feeble is the name, like it or not. Similar to a Smith, but the nose of the board is on the opposite side of the grind.

sub_items.name: BS Willy
sub_items.description: Willy Grinds are generally done by accident, but you can learn to do them on purpose.

sub_items.name: FS Willy
sub_items.description: Approach frontside and get just your front truck onto the grind or let the Crooks drop down.

sub_items.name: BS Over Willy
sub_items.description: The name is debatable. It could also be called a Feeble Willy.

sub_items.name: FS Over Willy
sub_items.description: Front truck grind with the back truck hanging over the far side.

sub_items.name: Slides
sub_items.description: Any grind where the board slides on a rail or ledge.

sub_items.name: FS Board
sub_items.description: Approach with the grind then turn the board or your body sideways to land onto he middle of the board.

sub_items.name: BS Board
sub_items.description: Approach with the grind then turn the board or your body sideways to land onto he middle of the board.

sub_items.name: FS Lip
sub_items.description: Lipslide is like a boardslide, but the tail of the board swings over to the far side.

sub_items.name: BS Lip
sub_items.description: Lipslide is like a boardslide, but the tail of the board swings over to the far side.

sub_items.name: BS Nose
sub_items.description: To land onto your nose, push the board forward then swing the nose towards the grind.

sub_items.name: FS Nose
sub_items.description: To land onto your nose, push the board forward then swing the nose towards the grind.

sub_items.name: BS Tail
sub_items.description: You can land directly into tail slides or turn into them from other grinds.

sub_items.name: FS Tail
sub_items.description: You can land directly into tail slides or turn into them from other grinds.

sub_items.name: FS Noseblunt
sub_items.description: Similar to a Nose Slide, but the board swings to the far side. Nice.

sub_items.name: BS Noseblunt
sub_items.description: Line up the grind, push the nose down and swing it to the toeside.

sub_items.name: BS Blunt
sub_items.description: Approach backside, pull the board backward then swing the tail towards your toeside.

sub_items.name: FS Blunt
sub_items.description: Blunt Slide isl ike a tail slide, but the board is on the far side of the grind from the approach.

sub_items.name: Grind Grabs
sub_items.description: Mix in a few board grabs while grinding.

sub_items.name: FS Grab BS 50-50
sub_items.description: Backside approach with a Frontside Grab.

sub_items.name: BS Grab BS 50-50
sub_items.description: You can land your grabs straight into these grind grabs or add a grab while grinding.

sub_items.name: BS Grab FS 50-50
sub_items.description: Reminder that a BS Grab is done with your front hand.

sub_items.name: FS Grab FS 50-50
sub_items.description: Double Frontsides. Frontside approach with a Frontside Grab.

sub_items.name: FS Grab BS 5-0
sub_items.description: Grab your 5-0 Grind or just tilt your 50-50 Grab up.

sub_items.name: Nose Grab BS 5-0
sub_items.description: Use your front hand to grab the nose.

sub_items.name: FS Grab FS 5-0
sub_items.description: Double Frontsides. Frontside approach with a Frontside Grab.

sub_items.name: Nose Grab FS 5-0
sub_items.description: Approach frontside, land on your back truck then grab with your front hand. Easy enough.

sub_items.name: FS Grab FS Salad
sub_items.description: Land into it, grab during it or turn into from a 5-0 FS Grab.

sub_items.name: Nose Grab FS Salad
sub_items.description: Get into a FS Salad rthen grab the nose of the board.

sub_items.name: FS Grab BS Salad
sub_items.description: Land into it, grab during it or turn into from a 5-0 FS Grab.

sub_items.name: Nose Grab BS Salad
sub_items.description: Learn the Backside Salad then add a Nose Grab.

sub_items.name: BS Grab BS Nose Grind
sub_items.description: Not very stylish, but it gets the job done.

sub_items.name: Tail Grab BS Nose Grind
sub_items.description: Push the board forward to land on the front truck, then grab with your back hand.

sub_items.name: BS Grab FS Nose Grind
sub_items.description: Get into a Nose Grind then grab with your front hand.

sub_items.name: Tail Grab FS Nose Grind
sub_items.description: Frontside approach into a Nose Grind then grab the tail.

sub_items.name: BS Grab FS Crooks
sub_items.description: Get into a Crooked Grind then grab with your front hand.

sub_items.name: Tail Grab FS Crooks
sub_items.description: Land into it, grab during it or turn into from a Nose Grind Tail Grab.

sub_items.name: BS Grab BS Crooks
sub_items.description: Just a simple Backside Grab during a backside Crooked Grind. Easy.

sub_items.name: Tail Grab BS Crooks
sub_items.description: Approach Backside, point the nose at an angle then grab the tail.

sub_items.name: Tail Grab FS Overcrooks
sub_items.description: Frontside approach, angle the board into the grind then grab with your back hand.

sub_items.name: BS Grab FS Overcrooks
sub_items.description: Just grab with your front hand during your FS Overcrooks.

sub_items.name: Tail Grab BS Overcrooks
sub_items.description: Land into it, grab during it or turn into from a Nose Grind Tail Grab.

sub_items.name: BS Grab BS Overcrooks
sub_items.description: There are lots of variations now that you can grab during grinds.

sub_items.name: Tail Grab BS Nose Slide
sub_items.description: Backside approach into a Nose Slide then grab with your back hand.

sub_items.name: Tail Grab FS Nose Slide
sub_items.description: Master the Nose Slide then just grab onto the tail.

sub_items.name: Tail Grab BS Noseblunt
sub_items.description: Backside Nose Blunts are stylish. Now you can also grab the tail.

sub_items.name: Nose Grab BS Blunt
sub_items.description: Backside approach into a Blunt then grab with your front hand.

sub_items.name: Tail Grab FS Noseblunt
sub_items.description: Approach Frontside, point the nose down, swing it into position then just grab the tail.

sub_items.name: Nose Grab FS Tail Slide
sub_items.description: Master the tail slide and add a Nose Grab.

sub_items.name: Nose Grab BS Tail Slide
sub_items.description: Land into it, grab during the tail slide or twist into it from 5-0 Nose Grab.

sub_items.name: Nose Grab FS Blunt
sub_items.description: You have to land straight into blunts. Now grab the Nose.

sub_items.name: Darkslides
sub_items.description: Catch the board upside down and slide on a rail to execute a darkslide.

sub_items.name: FS Dark Slide
sub_items.description: Darkslides are done by performing a darkcatch and landing on a rail or ledge.

sub_items.name: FS Darkslide Tail Grab
sub_items.description: Once you are in a darkslide, you can grab the board to style out your Darkslides.

sub_items.name: FS Dark Slide Nose Grab
sub_items.description: Once you are in a darkslide, you can grab the board to style out your Darkslides.

sub_items.name: BS Bark Slide Nose Grab
sub_items.description: Once you are in a darkslide, you can grab the board to style out your Darkslides.

sub_items.name: FS Dark Slide Double Grab
sub_items.description: Once you are in a darkslide, you can grab the board to style out your Darkslides.

sub_items.name: BS Dark Slide Tail Grab
sub_items.description: Once you are in a darkslide, you can grab the board to style out your Darkslides.

sub_items.name: BS Dark Slide
sub_items.description: Darkslides are done by performing a darkcatch and landing on a rai or ledge.

sub_items.name: BS Dark Slide Double Grab
sub_items.description: Once you are in a darkslide, you can grab the board to style out your Darkslides.

sub_items.name: Hand Plants
sub_items.description: Handplants are also called inverts.

sub_items.name: FS Handplant
sub_items.description: Skate up a transition at a slight angle and hold the button as you approach the edge. Too fast or too much of an angle and you'll air out.

sub_items.name: BS Handplant
sub_items.description: BS is Backside. Skate up a ramp at a slight angle towards your toe side, so the top of the ramp is slightly to your backside.

sub_items.name: FS Tailbone Plant
sub_items.description: Get into the FS Handplant and tweak your board in the same direction.

sub_items.name: FS Tuck Knee Plant
sub_items.description: Push the board forward during a BS Handplant to hit the Nosebone.

sub_items.name: Stiffy Handplant
sub_items.description: Push the board forward during a FS Handplant to hit the Nosebone. Handplants are also called Inverts.

sub_items.name: FS Boned Plant
sub_items.description: Get into the FS Handplant and tweak the board behind you.

sub_items.name: BS Tuck Knee Plant
sub_items.description: Pull the board down to drop the knee.

sub_items.name: Crossbone Handplant
sub_items.description: Push the board forward during a BS Handplant to hit the Nosebone.

sub_items.name: Method Handplant
sub_items.description: Tweak the board to the in front of  your to style it out.

sub_items.name: Tweak Plant
sub_items.description: Tweak the board behind you to arch out a method.

sub_items.name: One Foot Plant
sub_items.description: As good a name as any for kicking off your back foot during a BS Handplant.

sub_items.name: Judo Handplant
sub_items.description: Kick out your front foot during the BS Handplant.

sub_items.name: Frigid Plant
sub_items.description: Kick off your back foot.

sub_items.name: FS One Foot Plant
sub_items.description: Kick off your front foot.

sub_items.name: FS Gymnast Plant
sub_items.description: Artist interpretation of a FS Gymnast Plant. Just kick off both feet.

sub_items.name: Gymnast Plant
sub_items.description: Kick off both feet during a BS Handplant.

name: Manuals
description: Manuals at one time were called wheelies.

sub_items.name: Manual
sub_items.description: Pull your board partway back and find the sweet spot. If you go too far you will get ready for an ollie, so let go and try again.

sub_items.name: Nose Manual
sub_items.description: Push your board partway forward and find the sweet spot. With practice you can find it and land straight into manuals.

name: Hall of Meat
description: All the Hall of Meat actions you'll ever need.

sub_items.name: Intentional Wipeout
sub_items.description: Press these at the same time to wipeout. In the air during a wipeout you can control your body and tweak into different positions.

sub_items.name: Cannonball
sub_items.description: During a wipeout push forward to tuck yourself into a Cannonball. Tucking up will also help you spin or flip faster.

sub_items.name: Spread Eagle
sub_items.description: During a wipeout pull down to spread out your arms and legs. This will slow down your spin or flip. It can also be used for gliding.

sub_items.name: Torpedo
sub_items.description: During a wipeout tweak to the left to get yourself into a Torpedo.

sub_items.name: Judo Kick
sub_items.description: During a wipeout tweak to the right to get into a Judo Kick pose then see if you can line up a target.

sub_items.name: Push Off
sub_items.description: Use push-offs to extend your bails by pushing off the ground with your feet. For best results, push-off when upright in a cannonball pose!

name: Other Tricks
description: Hippy Jumps, Coffins, Wallrides, and more. Here's the how-to.

sub_items.name: No-Comply
sub_items.description: Push with your front foot then very quickly do an ollie. Very quickly.

sub_items.name: Hippy Jump
sub_items.description: Press and release both feet to jump. Hold longer for a higher jump.

sub_items.name: Pumping
sub_items.description: Pump corners and transitions to gan speed or boost bigger airs.

sub_items.name: Coffin
sub_items.description: Early skate trick that is good for slipping through tight spots. Double grab then kick off both geet. Also works in the air.

sub_items.name: Brake
sub_items.description: Press and hold the button to slow yourself down. If you want to.

sub_items.name: Powerslide
sub_items.description: While moving, pull straight down or pull down from a turn to do a powerslide. Experiment with different angles, speeds and tricks.

sub_items.name: Revert
sub_items.description: A revert is a quick 180 powerslide. With the left stick moved to the left or right, quickly move it down and around to the other side.

sub_items.name: Front Flip
sub_items.description: Your flips will be straight or off to the side depending on the angle you start them.

sub_items.name: Back Flip
sub_items.description: Start grabbing the board and pull down just as you take off into the air to start a back flip. Let go at the right time to land.

sub_items.name: Wallride
sub_items.description: To ride a wall, simply land your skater on a wall and ride it.

sub_items.name: Skitching
sub_items.description: Hold the button when behind a vehicle to skitch. If it's too far away keep holding the button as you approach to make the car slow down.

sub_items.name: Release Darkcatch
sub_items.description: Need to get out of a Darkcatch and there's no rail or ledge below you? Just press the button again to flip your board upright.

name: Offboard Actions
description: Want to have fun while you are off your board? Check out this step by step guide.

sub_items.name: Drop ins
sub_items.description: Use drop-ins to enter bowls and pools in style. Walk up to the coping and mount your board.

sub_items.name: Acid Drop
sub_items.description: From offboard, run and jump, amd quickly place your board under your feet while you are in the air.

sub_items.name: Caveman
sub_items.description: From offboard, run towards a rail, jump, and then quickly put your board under your feet before you land on the rail.

sub_items.name: Mount and Dismount
sub_items.description: You can dismount your board at almost anytime. On the ground, in the air and mid-trick. Grab onto it first if you don't want it to fly away.

sub_items.name: Walk
sub_items.description: Getting off board lets you get to places you can't while skating. Hint: Look for stairs.

sub_items.name: Sprint
sub_items.description: No world records here, but spring does help you go just a little faster when you are off board.

sub_items.name: Jump
sub_items.description: Hit the button to jump while off your board.

sub_items.name: Punch / Swing Board
sub_items.description: Did you know? You can punch or swing your board at people and skaters to try and knock them down.

name: Terminology
description: Some definitions for those who might be wondering what a Hubba is.

sub_items.name: Frontside & Backside
sub_items.description: FS stands for frontside. BS stands for Backside. Referring to the side that a trick is done on or how the skater approaches an obstacle.

sub_items.name: Fakie
sub_items.description: Fakie is when a skater is riding backwards or a trick that is done while backwards.

sub_items.name: Switch
sub_items.description: Switch is when a skater is riding in the opposite stance from how they normally ride.

sub_items.name: Bank
sub_items.description: A bank is a flat angled surface good for doing tricks on.

sub_items.name: Coping
sub_items.description: Coping is the grindable edge at the top of a transition, including pools and halfpipes. That is where you can do handplants.

sub_items.name: Drop
sub_items.description: A drop is a big change in vertical height, airing off and dropping a long distance. The bigger the drop the bigger the points.

sub_items.name: Gap
sub_items.description: An air between two points over something in between, oincluding an air over grass, between two ramps or over a set of stairs.

sub_items.name: Hubba
sub_items.description: Hubba is a type of ledge, a steep, fat ledge that slopes doen besides a set of stairs, bank, transition or gap.

sub_items.name: Ledge
sub_items.description: Ledge is a square edge that a grind ca be done on.

sub_items.name: Manny Pad
sub_items.description: Manny Pad is raised surface that is good for doing manual tricks across.

sub_items.name: Rails
sub_items.description: Rails come in many sizes and shapes, but they are all skinny things to grind.

sub_items.name: Step-up
sub_items.description: Step Up is when a skater airs up to a higher landing point. The higher the Step Up the higher the points.

sub_items.name: Transfer
sub_items.description: A Transfer is when a skater airs to a different riding area, including a transfer over a spine or from one ramp to another.

sub_items.name: Transition / Tranny
sub_items.description: Transition is a curved surface and is also a style of skating that includes pools, halfpipes and bowls. Any transition can be used for pumping.
